prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为3127→3201→4387→5793→4768，整体呈后移趋势，2023–2024年连续两年大幅后移，2025年有所回升至4768名，近3年波动 幅度约1400名；该校在海南省2021–2025年招生计划均为3人，2026年计划仍为3人，连续6年保持不变，无扩招或缩招信号，招生规模对竞争 格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第58名，近年排名稳定在52–61名区间，属于中上层次211师范类院校；2025–2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（环境学院副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗事件），抖音综合热度排名第69位（一般 ），未见明显投档断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度为分化观望（heat_ind ex=55.84），整体平稳；海南省2026年普通高考考生总数约78,000人，较2025年67,408人增加约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；负面舆情可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；第五轮学科评估中，教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、 外国语言文学A-，共5个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出，对有志于教育行业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生规模大幅增加（+15.7%）以及学校近期负面舆情等因素，考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧效应略强于声誉负面带 来的报考意愿下降效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约4668名，区间4168–5168名。

一档（最难进）
- 海洋资源与环境
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 南京师范大学在海南省综合类仅招收海洋资源与环境一个专业（物理、化学必选），招生计划仅3人，专业选择空间极为有限。位次在预测区间4168–5168名内的考生可尝试报考 ，位次明显优于区间下限（<4168名）录取概率较高；位次在区间中后段（>4668名）需谨慎，建议结合其他院校志愿保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Province's comprehensive category were 3127→3201→4387→5793→4768, showing an overall backward trend. In 2023–2024, there were two consecutive years of significant backward movement, with a rebound to 4768 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 3 years is about 1400 places. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province from 2021 to 2025 has been 3 students, and the 2026 plan remains 3 students, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction. The enrollment scale has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 58th, with a stable range of 52–61 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 normal universities. During the 2025–2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (the deputy dean of the School of Environment being dismissed for extramarital affairs, and the mistaken hanging of the Rising Sun flag). Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 69th (average), with no obvious records of application gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors is divided and wait-and-see (heat index=55.84), generally stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition. Negative public opinion may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has 5 disciplines rated A- or above: Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, and Foreign Languages and Literature A-. The strength of normal disciplines is outstanding, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to the education industry.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the number of local candidates (+15.7%), and the recent negative public opinion of the university, the intensified competition effect from the expanded candidate pool slightly outweighs the decline in application willingness caused by negative reputation. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4668, with a range of 4168–5168.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Marine Resources and Environment
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Nanjing Normal University only offers one major, Marine Resources and Environment (with required subjects of Physics and Chemistry), in the comprehensive category in Hainan Province, with an enrollment plan of only 3 students, resulting in extremely limited major selection space. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 4168–5168 can attempt to apply; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4168) have a higher probability of admission. Candidates with rankings in the middle to back end of the range (>4668) should be cautious and consider combining with other university choices as a backup.
